category_sources: Official InfluxData docs describe Telegraf as a server-based agent that collects and sends metrics and events.
source_facts.description says Telegraf is a plugin-driven server agent for collecting and reporting metrics.
display_name_sources: Official InfluxData documentation and homepage use the product name Telegraf.
docs_sources: Official InfluxData Telegraf documentation at docs.influxdata.com/telegraf/v1/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official InfluxData docs describe metrics/events collection and plugin documentation.
source_facts.description mentions collecting and reporting metrics.
